strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, backend, and embedded systems
Early exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and distributed micro-services at scale (Sociomantic)
concerns: No demonstrated executive leadership or experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+
Lacks production multi-agent AI systems experience and fintech/regulated-environment depth
Title and trajectory are individual contributor (Senior/Staff), not CTO-level with board-facing responsibility

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and high-throughput backend depth

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff engineer with strong full-stack and distributed-systems foundations, some exposure to agentic AI tooling, and brief fintech-adjacent work at RIDE Capital. However, the role requires executive-level leadership with a track record of scaling teams to 30+, production multi-agent AI systems, and deep regulated-fintech experience — none of which are evidenced in the resume. The profile aligns more with a senior IC or tech-lead trajectory than a CTO appointment at a venture-backed scale-up.
